title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF GATMAITAN STREET IN LIPA CITY TO TEODORO M. KALAW STREET.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2881

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2772, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF GATMAITAN STREET IN LIPA CITY TO TEODORO M. KALAW STREET.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Gatmaitan Street in Lipa City is hereby changed to Teodoro M. Kalaw Street.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
